name: Linguica Crusted Roasted Salmon Cedar Plank
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces linguica or your favorite sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Season the salmon with 1 tablespoon olive oil and essence.
3. In a large sauté pan, heat the remaining oil. When the pan is smoking hot, sear the salmon for 1-2 minutes on each side.
4. Remove the salmon from the pan and place it on a cedar plank.
5. In another sauté pan, render the finely chopped linguica for 2-3 minutes.
6. Add enough bread crumbs to bind the sausage. Stir in the lemon and orange zest.
7. Season with salt and pepper.
8. Crust the top of the salmon with the linguica crust using your hands. Pack the crust onto the salmon.
9. Roast for 8-10 minutes for medium rare.
10. Place the cedar plank on a platter. Garnish with chives and essence.
